title: Items, Begone!
description: A simple ID/blacklist mod designed for ease of use while still being plenty powerful!
body:
'Items, Begone!' is a utility mod for server admins that allows them to control what items are allowed to be used in a Minecraft server.

A core design feature of IBG is its team-based approach, allowing you to create advanced rulesets for individual groups of people, or, if you'd like, the entire server as a whole via the autogenerated 'global' group, all while using Minecraft's built-in Team system! And, thanks to its ID checking system, it should be compatible with almost, if not all other mods!

IBG also runs almost entirely server-side, meaning your server can be regulated regardless of what mods are present on your players clients, though additional features for clients with the mod are planned in the near future!
